targets.expr: clamp_min((max_over_time(max by (strategy)(freqtrade_balance{strategy=~"$strategies"})[6h:5m]) - max by (strategy)(freqtrade_balance{strategy=~"$strategies"})) / max_over_time(max by (strategy)(freqtrade_balance{strategy=~"$strategies"})[6h:5m]) * 100, 0)
